title: Attention Within a Sentence
concept: Self-attention lets words in a single sentence relate to each other, resolving pronoun references and clarifying local context.

exercises.prompt: What does "self-attention" help an AI model figure out?

options.text: How words in a single sentence relate to each other
How to translate words into numbers only
How to spell difficult words correctly

exercises.explain: Understanding the relationships between words in a single sentence is the core job of self-attention.

cards.title: The Mystery of "It"
cards.body: When you read the word "it," how do you know what it refers to? Humans do this instantly, but computers need a special trick called self-attention to connect the dots inside a sentence.

cards.title: What is Self-Attention?
cards.body: Self-attention is a smart mechanism that allows an AI model to look at all the words in a single sentence at the same time and decide which ones are most closely connected to each other.

cards.title: The Party Connection
cards.body: Think of self-attention like a group of people at a party wearing name tags. Instead of ignoring everyone else, each person looks around the room and draws lines of connection to the people they need to talk to most to understand the conversation.

cards.title: Context in Action
cards.body: In the sentence: "The bank of the river was wet," the word "bank" connects strongly to "river" and "wet". This tells the AI that "bank" means land, not a place where money is kept!

cards.title: Myth: AI Reads Word-by-Word
cards.body: People often think AI reads words one by one in a strict sequence. In reality, modern AI uses self-attention to look at all words simultaneously, letting them interact and clarify each other's meanings instantly.

cards.title: Visualizing Connections
cards.body: See how the relationship changes depending on which words the AI focuses on.

exercises.prompt: In the sentence "The dog chased the ball because it was rolling," what does self-attention help the AI connect the word "it" to?
exercises.explain: Self-attention allows the AI to link "it" to "ball" because of the surrounding context in the same sentence.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Self-attention helps an AI determine how words in the same sentence relate to each other.
exercises.explain: Self-attention is designed specifically to find connections between words within the same sentence to build local context.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the missing word to complete the concept of word relationships.
exercises.sentence: To connect words in a single sentence, AI uses self-________.
exercises.explain: Self-attention allows the AI to weigh the relationships between all words in a sentence.

exercises.prompt: Which sentence shows an AI correctly using self-attention to link the pronoun "it" to the correct object?

options.text: "The chef baked a cake and then he ate a computer."
"The chef baked a cake and then he decorated it."
"The chef baked a cake and then he decorated yesterday."

exercises.explain: AI-generated text uses self-attention to maintain correct pronoun references, while random word generation lacks any logical internal connections.

exercises.prompt: How does self-attention actually help a computer figure out what a word like "it" refers to in a sentence?

options.text: It scores how much every word in the sentence relates to every other word.
It translates the sentence into another language word-by-word.
It deletes unimportant words to make the sentence shorter.
It only looks at the first and last words of the sentence.

exercises.explain: Self-attention recalculates meaning by looking at the entire sentence at once, allowing words like 'it' to instantly link to the nouns they refer to based on context.
